summary: root.go registers the hand-authored near/state/show/search/sql commands, swaps the generated no-op sync for newRoadsideSyncCmd (per-state cache population + verify-mode seed), and sets a polite default --rate-limit of 0.34 req/s.
reason: AddCommand wiring for hand-authored commands lives in root.go; the generated no-op sync was replaced; scrape CLIs need a non-zero polite rate-limit default.
